analysis: The current project files for the black holes theme are incomplete. The HTML file lacks sections on black holes, the CSS file is missing cosmic-themed animations and visual effects, and the JavaScript file has syntax errors and incomplete functionality. The theme should include animated black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and interactive slides.

improvements.description: Add sections on black holes, including interactive planets, animated slides, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon.
Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, glowing elements, and a mobile-friendly navigation menu.

Fix syntax errors in the showSlide function and beforeunload event listener, and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including mobile menu toggle functionality.
